raw_consumer_statement: Dear XXXX, here is the story : I bought some clothing in XXXX  and the package was stolen ( I have a message proof to show that the delivery company accepted it was their fault ), then I go directly to dispute the money in Citi with the reason " Service/Good never received '', because I use my citi credit card to pay this bill. However, XXXX gave some evidence to Citi but with no evidence showing that the package was delivered in a secured place, and my dispute was terminated with a recharge to me. I then contacted XXXX online service for this charge and they refunded me the money ( with refund email and receipt ). However, I never got it in my Citi account. When I try to reach Citi dispute center with the refund invoice by email several times, they kept sending messages saying the case already closed and the company ( XXXX ) does not want to issue the credit.
